pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs checking the 'Event Collection Status' checkbox.
Task description explicitly instructs entering the email address 'soc-team@company.local'.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the notification frequency (the 'Run every' interval) to '1 Hours', slightly contradicting the metadata's 'Every 1 Hour'.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the agent to configure new ManageEngine ADAudit Plus notification settings from scratch via the web UI. Verified the expected target email 'soc-team@company.local', the required notification type 'Event Collection Status', and the exact required frequency '1 Hours' match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Discovered that the task relies on an external VLM for evaluation, as the local verifier is a stub that always returns passed=True.
